title: 1. Getting Started
description: Install Tiny CLI, create your first project, and learn the basics of the game loop.

title: 2. Build a Pong Game
description: Learn the fundamentals of Tiny by building a classic Pong game. Covers input handling, collision detection, and game state.

title: 3. Exporting Your Game
description: Export your game for the web or desktop, and deploy it to itch.io or any static host.

title: 4. Sprites & Animation
description: Draw spritesheets, animate characters, flip sprites, and manage multiple sheets.

title: 5. Maps with LDtk
description: Build game levels with the LDtk editor. Draw maps, handle entities, and implement tile-based collision.

title: 6. Custom Fonts
description: Create bitmap font spritesheets, configure font banks, and give your game a unique look.

title: 7. Adding Sound
description: Design chip-tune sound effects with the SFX editor and play them from your Lua code.
